comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Verified in current checkout as a user-facing error formatting issue. extensions/tau/src/agents-menu/index.ts:73-84 wraps registry/validation failures with AgentMenuRegistryLoadError using reason: Cause.pretty(cause). formatRegistryLoadError(...) then shows that reason directly in notifications at lines 92-111. Cause.pretty can include verbose internal structure from Effect causes rather than a concise actionable message. This is not a correctness bug in registry loading itself, but the review claim is accurate that UI notifications currently expose raw pretty-printed causes instead of intentionally mapped user-facing errors.
